entries.title: Critical Vulnerability in Claude Code Emerges Days After Source Leak
entries.summary: Within days of each other, Anthropic first leaked the source code to Claude Code, and then a critical vulnerability was found by Adversa AI. The post Critical Vulnerability in Claude Code Emerges Days After Source Leak appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Apple Rolls Out DarkSword Exploit Protection to More Devices
entries.summary: The DarkSword exploit kit has been used by both state-sponsored hackers and commercial spyware vendors. The post Apple Rolls Out DarkSword Exploit Protection to More Devices appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Cybersecurity M&A Roundup: 38 Deals Announced in March 2026
entries.summary: Significant cybersecurity M&A deals announced by Airbus, Cellebrite, Databricks, Quantum eMotion, Rapid7, and OpenAI. The post Cybersecurity M&A Roundup: 38 Deals Announced in March 2026 appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Cisco Patches Critical and High-Severity Vulnerabilities
entries.summary: The bugs could lead to authentication bypass, remote code execution, information disclosure, and privilege escalation. The post Cisco Patches Critical and High-Severity Vulnerabilities appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: 250,000 Affected by Data Breach at Nacogdoches Memorial Hospital
entries.summary: In January 2026, a threat actor hacked the hospital’s internal network and stole personal and health information. The post 250,000 Affected by Data Breach at Nacogdoches Memorial Hospital appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Mercor Hit by LiteLLM Supply Chain Attack
entries.summary: The AI recruiting firm is investigating the incident as Lapsus$ claimed the theft of 4TB of Mercor data. The post Mercor Hit by LiteLLM Supply Chain Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Sophisticated CrystalX RAT Emerges
entries.summary: The malware can spy on victims, steal their information, and make configuration changes on devices. The post Sophisticated CrystalX RAT Emerges appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Variance Raises $21.5M for Compliance Investigation Platform Powered by AI Agents
entries.summary: Variance has raised a total of $26 million in funding and the latest investment will fuel platform growth. The post Variance Raises $21.5M for Compliance Investigation Platform Powered by AI Agents appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Linx Security Raises $50 Million for Identity Security and Governance
entries.summary: The company will accelerate product development, scale go-to-market efforts, and expand its global footprint. The post Linx Security Raises $50 Million for Identity Security and Governance appeared first on SecurityWeek .

entries.title: Depthfirst Raises $80 Million in Series B Funding
entries.summary: The startup will expand its AI research team, train additional security models, and scale enterprise adoption. The post Depthfirst Raises $80 Million in Series B Funding appeared first on SecurityWeek .
